is.one_liner: Sovereign read-side inventory aggregator — joins sonar holdings with owned metadata, with a verifiable completeness envelope
scope: Resolve holder inventory + NFT metadata for registered collections (Mibera first)
Attach an ACVP completeness envelope: provably complete as of block N

is_not: Does NOT manage minting, burning, or transfer initiation
Does NOT proxy chain RPC — consumes freeside-sonar for indexed reads
Will NOT own metadata — that is the codex / freeside-storage

freeside-sonar.role: Indexed read source: holder counts (TrackedHolder) + chain head (chain_metadata)

freeside-storage.role: Collection metadata (image URLs, traits) — codex today, storage at sovereign cutover

acvp_invariants.scope: Holdings responses carry {as_of_block, holder_count, source, complete} from sonar; degraded when upstream unreachable

cycle_state.note: Library stage. Live counts + ACVP envelope wired to belt-gateway; per-token ownership + MCP/HTTP deployment pending (see docs/sonar-ownership-gap.md).
